verses.1: For, behold, the Lord, GOD of Armies, takes away from Jerusalem and from Judah supply and support,
verses.4: I will give boys to be their princes,
verses.6: Indeed a man shall take hold of his brother in the house of his father, saying,
verses.7: In that day he will cry out, saying, “I will not be a healer;
verses.8: For Jerusalem is ruined, and Judah is fallen;
verses.9: The look of their faces testify against them.
verses.10: Tell the righteous that it will be well with them,
verses.12: As for my people, children are their oppressors,
verses.13: The LORD stands up to contend,
verses.14: The LORD will enter into judgment with the elders of his people
verses.15: What do you mean that you crush my people,
verses.16: Moreover the LORD said, “Because the daughters of Zion are arrogant,
verses.17: therefore the Lord brings sores on the crown of the head of the women of Zion,
verses.18: In that day the Lord will take away the beauty of their anklets, the headbands, the crescent necklaces,
verses.19: the earrings, the bracelets, the veils,
verses.20: the headdresses, the ankle chains, the sashes, the perfume containers, the charms,
verses.21: the signet rings, the nose rings,
verses.22: the fine robes, the capes, the cloaks, the purses,
verses.23: the hand mirrors, the fine linen garments, the tiaras, and the shawls.
verses.24: It shall happen that instead of sweet spices, there shall be rottenness;
verses.25: Your men shall fall by the sword,
verses.26: Her gates shall lament and mourn.
